zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John de Mowbray III於1340年6月25日出生在英國林可爾史爾艾普沃斯時，他的父親John de Mowbray29歲，母親Joan of Lancaster28歲。他於1359年3月25日與Elizabeth Segrave在英國林可爾史爾艾普沃斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1368年6月17日在土耳其拉斯享年27歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John de Mowbray III于1340年6月25日出生在英国林可爾史爾艾普沃斯时，他的父亲John de Mowbray29岁，母亲Joan of Lancaster28岁。他于1359年3月25日与Elizabeth Segrave在英国林可爾史爾艾普沃斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1368年6月17日在土耳其拉斯享年27岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mowbray
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern; of Norman origin): habitational name from Montbray (Manche). Robert de Mowbray was Earl of Northumbria 1086–95, but was later imprisoned and deposed for rebelling against William II.

variants.name: Mulberry
meanings: English (Middlesex and Cambridgeshire): variant of   Mowbray  .
Irish (Derry): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Maoilbhearaigh ‘descendant of the devotee of (Saint) Bearach’.

variants.name: Mayberry
meanings: English: most probably an altered form of   Mowbray  . It is also found as   Maybury  , which has the form of an English habitational name. There is a place near Woking in Surrey so called; however, this is not recorded until 1885 and is probably derived from the surname. In England this surname is found mainly in the West Midlands; it has also spread into Wales. In Ireland this form is common in Ulster; MacLysaght records that it was taken there from England in the 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John de Mowbray III was born on 25 June 1340, in Epworth, Lincolnshire, England, his father, John de Mowbray, was 29 and his mother, Joan of Lancaster, was 28. He married Elizabeth Segrave on 25 March 1359, in Epworth, Lincolnshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 17 June 1368, in Thrace, Türkiye, at the age of 27.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John de Mowbray III est né le 25 juin 1340, à Epworth, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, John de Mowbray, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Joan of Lancaster, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Segrave le 25 mars 1359, à Epworth, Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 17 juin 1368, à Thrace, Turquie, à l’âge de 27 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John de Mowbray III am 25. Juni 1340 in Epworth, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Mowbray 29 und seine Mutter Joan of Lancaster 28. Er hat am 25. März 1359 in Epworth, Lincolnshire, England Elizabeth Segrave geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 17. Juni 1368 im Alter von 27 Jahren in Thrace, Türkei.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de Mowbray III è nato il il 25 giugno 1340 nel Epworth, Lincolnshire, England, il suo padre, John de Mowbray, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Joan of Lancaster, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Segrave il 25 marzo 1359, nel Epworth, Lincolnshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 17 giugno 1368, nel Thrace, Turchia, all'età di 27 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John de Mowbray IIIが1340年6月25日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアエプウオルスで生まれた時，父John de Mowbrayは29歳，母Joan of Lancasterは28歳であった。1359年3月25日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアエプウオルスでElizabeth Segraveと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1368年6月17日にトルコスレイスで27歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John de Mowbray III(이)가 1340년 6월 25일 영국 링코실르 프워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Mowbray(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan of Lancaster(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1359년 3월 25일 영국 링코실르 프워스에서 Elizabeth Segrave(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1368년 6월 17일 튀르키예 스라스에서 27세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.25 June 1340–17 June 1368: 25 de junho de 1340–17 de junho de 1368
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de Mowbray III nasceu em 25 de junho de 1340, em Epworth, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Mowbray, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Joan of Lancaster, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Segrave em 25 de março de 1359, em Epworth, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 17 de junho de 1368, em Thrace, Turquia, com 27 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John de Mowbray III родился 25 июня 1340 г. в местности эпворт, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени John de Mowbray было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan of Lancaster, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Segrave 25 марта 1359 г. в местности эпворт, линколншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 17 июня 1368 г. в местности треис, Турция в возрасте 27 лет.

es.25 June 1340–17 June 1368: 25 de junio de 1340–17 de junio de 1368
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John de Mowbray III nació el 25 de junio de 1340, en Epworth, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Mowbray, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Joan of Lancaster, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Segrave el 25 de marzo de 1359, en Epworth, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 17 de junio de 1368, en Thrace, Turquía, a la edad de 27 años.
